title: SOP Verification of Echinococcus multilocularis magnetic capture method in red fox (Vulpes vulpes) faeces and proficiency test.
author: Rebecca Davidson
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This method describes the verification panel for ensuring that the homogenisation and capture of  Echinococcus  DNA from red fox faecal samples using a magnetic capture method combined with PCR (Isaksson et al. 2014; Øines et al.2014) has performed satisfactorily.
steps_raw: This method describes the verification panel for ensuring that the homogenisation and capture of  Echinococcus  DNA from red fox faecal samples using a magnetic capture method combined with PCR (Isaksson et al. 2014; Øines et al.2014) has performed satisfactorily.
